Fireball

Spell Details

Hurls a fiery ball that causes 14 to 18 Fire damage and an additional 2 Fire damage over 4 sec.

Rank 1 is learned by Mages at level 1. The spell has a cast time of 1.5 seconds and a mana cost of 30.
